headline: Here Are Tuesday’s Top Wall Street Analyst Research Calls: Autodesk, Celanese, DexCom, FormFactor, GitLab, Lowe’s, Matador Resources, Toast and More
summary: Pre-Market Stock Futures: The futures are trading lower on Tuesday, but another week and another set of new highs for the S&P 500 and the Nasdaq, as AI fever overshadowed Iran’s peace counteroffer dismissal on Monday. The stock market opened lower on the rejection of President Trump’s peace offering, but buyers once again circled the ...
